arts.ttl: Mayenda starts: Sunderland team news and predicted XI to face Hull City
arts.sum: The latest Sunderland team news as Regis Le Bris' side gear up to face Hull City in the Championship this Saturday. The post Mayenda starts: Sunderland team news and predicted XI to face Hull City appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Trafford on Burnley's clean-sheet run, JJ Watt wager and Sunderland pen saves
arts.sum: Confidence oozes from James Trafford as he speaks, but was he expecting things to be quite so good for him at Burnley this season?

arts.ttl: Hull City handed double boost for Sunderland as absentee list shrinks for Ruben Selles
arts.sum: Manchester City loanee Burns has missed the last three games with a calf injury, while Hughes has not played since the win over Swansea City before Christmas, but the duo have been in training this week and providing they come through Friday’s pre-game session ahead of the journey up to the North East, could be in the squad at the Stadium of Light . Hull City could be boosted by Charlie Hughes and Fin Burns returning for the trip to Sunderland on Saturday as they look to secure a first win since beating Sheffield United last month.

arts.ttl: Preview: Sunderland vs. Hull City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Sunderland and Hull City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
